name: simon_daily_briefing
description: Simon-specific deterministic daily briefing tool. Reads the Family calendar through shared Simon calendar credentials, groups today's events, and returns a Telegram-ready message without write capabilities.

oauth.pending_instructions: Use the same Simon-owned Google OAuth Web application client as simon_google_calendar. Copy the redirect URI from IronClaw's auth flow into Google Cloud Console exactly; do not guess it.

required_secrets.name: simon_google_calendar_oauth_client_id
required_secrets.prompt: Google OAuth Client ID for Simon Calendar

required_secrets.name: simon_google_calendar_oauth_client_secret
required_secrets.prompt: Google OAuth Client Secret for Simon Calendar
